# Issue-Tracker Driven Agent Workflow

This example maps tracker state to these phases:

| State | Meaning |
| --- | --- |
| Backlog | Do not implement. |
| Shaping | Draft or update the issue brief. |
| Needs Decision | Ask blocking questions. |
| Test Design | Agree on tests before code. |
| Ready | Implementation may start. |
| In Progress | Implement from tests first. |
| Verify | Run checks and update docs. |
| Done | Behavior, tests, traces, docs, and tracker state are current. |

The active example issue is `DEMO-1`.
